build.stdout:
rm	*.o *.out \
	./kernel/*.o \
	./util/timer/*.o \
	./util/num/*.o \
	./util/opencl/*.o \
                output.txt 2>/dev/null || true

gcc	 ./main.c \
		-c \
	    -I/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.3/cuda/include \
		-o ./main.o \
		-Wno-unused-result \
		-O3
gcc	 ./kernel/kernel_gpu_opencl_wrapper.c \
		-c \
		-o ./kernel/kernel_gpu_opencl_wrapper.o \
		-O3 \
		-I../util \
		-DTIMING \
		-I/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.3/cuda/include
gcc	 ./kernel/kernel_gpu_opencl_wrapper_2.c \
		-c \
		-o ./kernel/kernel_gpu_opencl_wrapper_2.o \
		-O3 \
		-I../util \
		-DTIMING \
		-I/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.3/cuda/include
gcc	./util/timer/timer.c \
		-c \
		-o ./util/timer/timer.o \
		-O3
gcc	./util/num/num.c \
		-c \
		-o ./util/num/num.o \
		-O3
gcc	./util/opencl/opencl.c \
		-c \
		-o ./util/opencl/opencl.o \
		-O3 \
		-I/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.3/cuda/include
gcc ../util/timing.c -I../util -c -o timing.o -I/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.3/cuda/include
gcc	./main.o \
		./kernel/kernel_gpu_opencl_wrapper.o \
		./kernel/kernel_gpu_opencl_wrapper_2.o \
		./util/timer/timer.o \
		./util/num/num.o \
		./util/opencl/opencl.o \
            ./timing.o \
		-lm \
		-L/opt/nvidia/hpc_sdk/Linux_x86_64/24.3/cuda/lib64 \
		-lOpenCL \
                -o b+tree.out
